name: Syra Coffee Poble Sec
summary: Published-hours specialty coffee near Poble-sec and the lower Montjuic approach.
whyItMatters: Useful for the Montjuic viewing days because it is closer to the hill than most top Barcelona specialty cafes.
pros: Official Syra page lists Poble Sec address and all-week 08:00-20:00 hours
European Coffee Trip lists Syra Coffee - Poble Sec in the Barcelona specialty guide
Works as a pre-Montjuic coffee stop before walking uphill
cons: Race-day crowding and street closures around Montjuic may change the walking route
Small-format chain cafe rather than a destination roaster experience

logistics.opening_hours: Mon-Sun 08:00-20:00, per Syra location page accessed 2026-06-22
logistics.distance_from_base: Barcelona base; exact lodging distance unknown
logistics.distance_from_viewing_point: Approximately 1.5-2 km walking to Montjuic Park areas depending on the viewing point
logistics.transit: Near Poble-sec; verify race-day metro and walking access
logistics.parking: Not recommended on race days; verify city restrictions
logistics.road_closure_notes: Montjuic race-day road closures are not sourced here; verify with the city/TDF events research before relying on this approach

timing.best_visit_window: Early morning before heading up Montjuic
timing.race_day_risk: Medium because Montjuic access may be constrained on Stage 1 and Stage 2

sources.title: Syra Coffee location page
sources.note: Supports Poble Sec address and listed opening hours.

sources.title: European Coffee Trip Barcelona guide
sources.note: Lists Syra Coffee - Poble Sec among Barcelona specialty coffee candidates.

open_questions: Cross-check Stage 1 and Stage 2 Montjuic pedestrian access before assigning this as a race-morning stop.
